details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements met: (1) INIObject.zig created with create, parse, stringify functions accepting JSGlobalObject/CallFrame and returning JSValue; (2) parse handles sections as nested objects, key=value pairs, and both ; and # comments via zero-allocation EntryIterator; (3) wired into BunObject.zig with lazy property callback pattern matching existing APIs; (4) C++ exports macro added; (5) TypeScript namespace with proper signatures and examples; (6) self-contained parser in interchange/ini.zig with no npm imports; (7) code follows Zig conventions with jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, arena allocators; (8) all three new files created with comprehensive tests covering edge cases (CRLF, empty values, multiple sections, roundtrips); (9) proper API wiring in api.zig and interchange.zig. Implementation mirrors TOML/JSONC patterns and demonstrates high code quality.
